title: JobTokenSecretManager.java
description:
- SecretManager for job token
- Can be used to cache generated job tokens
- Computes the HMAC hash of a message using a key
- Creates a new password/secret for a given job token identifier
- Caches job tokens for fast access
- Input: job token identifier, jobId, job token
- Output: token password/secret as SecretKey, token password/secret as byte[]
- Imported classes: SecretManager, Token, SecretKey, JobTokenIdentifier
- Parent class: None
- Collaborator classes: None
